product_description: Lexia® Core5® Reading is a technology-based, personalized reading program that provides explicit and systematic learning in six areas of reading instruction for students in PreK through 5. It delivers adaptive and individualized learning experiences to help students of all abilities advance their reading skills.

vendor_resources.text: Lexia Accessibility Conformance Report WCAG Edition
vendor_resources.justification: Document explicitly titled 'Lexia Accessibility Conformance Report WCAG Edition' for 'Lexia® Core5® Reading' and includes detailed conformance tables.

vendor_resources.text: How Lexia's Literacy Solutions Stay Current, Relevant, and Effective
vendor_resources.justification: Article from Lexia discussing Core5's alignment with WCAG accessibility standards, improved keyboard navigation, and volume control.

acr_reports.title: Lexia Accessibility Conformance Report WCAG Edition (for Lexia® Core5® Reading)
